text.message: what's up with all the steals,  that's 5 on me already?
no way, you ahve already stolen 2
why did you just give him a city?
ok, i'm officially in last, by a mile,  time to spread the love around on blocks and steals
red probably already has army in hand
its not like i can keep it
more importantly, you guys are on the 11, which seems to be all that matters
